name: Michael Sentonas
bio: Michael Sentonas was promoted to President of CrowdStrike in February 2023 after previously serving as Chief Technology Officer. He first became a Named Executive Officer in fiscal 2024; the proxy therefore discloses only two years of compensation (FY24–FY25). FY24 totals reflect a sizable promotion-related equity grant.

footnotes: Stock Awards reflect grant-date fair value of RSUs and PSUs under FASB ASC Topic 718 — an accounting figure, not realized pay. The maximum-performance value of FY25 PSU grants would be $22,750,402.
Non-Equity Incentive reflects the cash bonus paid under the Corporate Incentive Plan (CIP) for fiscal 2025 performance.
All Other Compensation reflects standard supplementary benefits (life/disability insurance, executive health, 401(k) match).
FY24 Stock Awards include a promotion-related equity grant tied to Mr. Sentonas's elevation to President in February 2023, inflating the year's reported total relative to FY25.
Stock Awards reflect grant-date fair value under FASB ASC Topic 718 — an accounting figure, not realized pay.
